svg.title: SciRet system architecture
svg.desc: SciRet pipeline: query encoder feeds into hybrid retriever and CLIP figure retriever, both draw from indexed document stores, results pass through cross-encoder reranker, then to generator with CIS grounding, producing a cited answer.
svg.text: Figure 1: SciRet architecture. Hybrid retriever pη (BM25 + dense) and CLIP figure retriever feed a cross-encoder reranker,
